Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python.exe <<'PY'
import json
nb_path = "notebooks/colab_training_2_1 \(1\).ipynb"
nb = json.load\(open\(nb_path, encoding="utf-8"\)\)

def read_file\(p\):
    return open\(p, encoding="utf-8"\).read\(\)

# Map: cell index -> \(source file on disk, target path in colab\)
updates = {
    11: \("src/training/train.py", "/content/conser-vision/src/training/train.py"\),
    12: \("src/evaluation/predict.py", "/content/conser-vision/src/evaluation/predict.py"\),
    13: \("configs/config.yaml", "/content/conser-vision/configs/config.yaml"\),
}

for idx, \(src_path, target_path\) in updates.items\(\):
    content = read_file\(src_path\)
    header = f"%%writefile {target_path}\\n"
    full = header + content
    nb["cells"][idx]["source"] = [line + "\\n" for line in full.splitlines\(\)]
    # Remove trailing \\n from last line to match Jupyter convention
    if nb["cells"][idx]["source"]:
        nb["cells"][idx]["source"][-1] = nb["cells"][idx]["source"][-1].rstrip\("\\n"\)
    nb["cells"][idx]["outputs"] = []
    nb["cells"][idx]["execution_count"] = None
    first = nb["cells"][idx]["source"][0].rstrip\(\)
    print\(f"cell {idx} updated: {first}  \({len\(content\)} bytes\)"\)

json.dump\(nb, open\(nb_path, "w", encoding="utf-8"\), indent=1, ensure_ascii=False\)
print\("notebook saved"\)
PY)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 .venv/Scripts/python.exe <<'PY'
# Sanity: reload notebook, verify cells 11/12/13 contain the expected strings
import json
nb = json.load\(open\("notebooks/colab_training_2_1 \(1\).ipynb", encoding="utf-8"\)\)
c11 = "".join\(nb["cells"][11]["source"]\)
c12 = "".join\(nb["cells"][12]["source"]\)
c13 = "".join\(nb["cells"][13]["source"]\)

checks = [
    \("cell 11 has StratifiedGroupKFold", "StratifiedGroupKFold" in c11\),
    \("cell 11 has no train_test_split", "train_test_split" not in c11\),
    \("cell 11 has the guardrail assert", "GROUP LEAKAGE in fold" in c11\),
    \("cell 11 stores val_sites in ckpt", '"val_sites"' in c11\),
    \("cell 12 has [calibration] log line", "[calibration] T =" in c12\),
    \("cell 13 strategy == StratifiedGroupKFold", "StratifiedGroupKFold" in c13\),
    \("cell 13 group_col: site", "group_col" in c13 and "site" in c13\),
    \("cell 13 no strategy: StratifiedKFold", "StratifiedKFold\\"" not in c13 and "strategy: \\"StratifiedKFold\\"" not in c13\),
]
ok = True
for name, v in checks:
    mark = "OK " if v else "FAIL"
    print\(f"  [{mark}] {name}"\)
    ok &= v
print\("ALL CHECKS PASS" if ok else "CHECK FAILED"\)
PY)
